DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JASMINE JACKSON'S MOTION TO QUASH DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS FOR NOMNOMNOW, INC. AND BACK TO ROOTS, INC.S PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS. JPT RECUSAL. CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 11, 2018. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEFFREY WOHL, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, JASMINE JACKSON'S MOTION TO QUASH DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS FOR NOMNOMNOW, INC. AND BACK TO ROOTS, INC.S PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS. MOTION TO QUASH DENIED. WHILE UNDER CERTAIN CIRCUMSTANCES THE INFORMATION TO BE OBTAINED VIA THE SUBPOENAS MAY BE CONSIDERED CHARACTER EVIDENCE, IT ALSO MAY BE USED FOR OTHER PURPOSES INCLUDING IMPEACHMENT, ESTABLISHMENT OF HABITS AND PATTERN OF PRACTICES ETC. IT WILL BE UP TO THE TRIAL JUDGE TO DETERMINE WHETHER ANY OF THIS INFORMATION IS EVENTUALLY ALLOWED INTO EVIDENCE. THE COURT IS WILLING TO CONSIDER ALLOWING PLAINTIFF A "FIRST LOOK" OF THE DOCUMENTS THAT WILL BE PRODUCED. ANY DOCUMENTS THAT PLAINTIFF OBJECTS TO WOULD THEN BE REVIEWED BY THE COURT IN-CAMERA. PREVAILING PARTY/DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 VIA EMAIL TO DAVIDMCDONALD@PRODIGY.NET - JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2018 Set For Trial On Aug-05-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Jasmine Jackson'S Ntc Of Mtn And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Nomnomnow, Inc. And Back To Roots, Inc.S Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Dec-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Corey B. Bennett, esq. (415-990-8390) of Matern Law Group, PC for Plaintiff Jasmine Jackson.
Roshni C. Kapoor, esq. (415-536-3403) of Ogletree Deakins for Defendant DIY Co.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Jasmine Jackson'S Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Nomnomnow, Inc. And Back To Roots, Inc.S Production Of Business Records.

Motion to quash denied. While under certain circumstances the information to be obtained via the subpoenas may be considered character evidence, it also may be used for other purposes including impeachment, establishment of habits and pattern of practices etc. It will be up to the trial judge to determine whether any of this information is eventually allowed into evidence. The Court is willing to consider allowing Plaintiff a "first look" of the documents that will be produced. Any documents that Plaintiff objects to would then be reviewed by the Court in-camera.

Prevailing party/Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to davidmcdonald@prodigy.net

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Nomnomnow, Inc. And Back To Roots, Inc.S Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JASMINE JACKSON's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Nomnomnow, Inc. And Back To Roots, Inc.S Production Of Business Records.

JPT Recusal. Continued to December 11, 2018.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
